premise: A plague doctor in a dying city discovers her cure is working — but the healed patients are coming back wrong. They remember things they shouldn't. They speak in a voice that isn't theirs.

characters.name: Istra
characters.description: Plague doctor, mid-30s. Pragmatic, exhausted, keeps a body count in her journal. Believes in the cure because the alternative is unthinkable.

characters.name: Wren
characters.description: Her first healed patient. A child who now draws maps of places that don't exist yet. Polite, hollow-eyed, unnervingly calm.

characters.name: Aldric
characters.description: The city's magistrate. Wants the cure distributed faster regardless of side effects. His daughter is sick.
